title: A round white UFO spotted swinging like a pendulum for 80 min in Guarujá [2014]
excerpt: MAY 4th. 2014. During a clear afternoon, at Praia da Enseada do Guarujá, State of São Paulo, from the window of her apartment at 04h20pm, a witness observed, for an hour and twenty minutes, an unidentified flying object with a round shape and of a strong white color, at an altitude “much lower than [the] […]
text_preview: MAY 4th. 2014. During a clear afternoon, at Praia da Enseada do Guarujá, State of São Paulo, from the window of her apartment at 04h20pm, a witness observed, for an hour and twenty minutes, an unidentified flying object with a round shape and of a strong white color, at an altitude “much lower than [the] altitude of the plane” making her think it was a helicopter. The object was “at the altitude of a helicopter”, but the witness ruled out this possibility because the object remained “still” and seemed to “swing like a pendulum”. Also in the report collected by the representative of COMDABRA [B
summary: A witness in Guarujá observed a round white UFO hovering and swinging like a pendulum for 80 minutes; photo and video were reported but not provided.
